title: LLM-Based Analytic Framework for Multilingual ESG Disclosure Assessment in Taiwan-Listed Companies
caption: Visual representation of the overall system architecture illustrating the data flow from bilingual Taiwan ESG disclosure inputs, through preprocessing steps, multilingual LLM fine-tuning with ESG lexicon integration, automated scoring modules, and final output generation for assessments.
data_source: Methodology section data and system design descriptions
notes: Include a flow diagram with modular blocks for data input (Mandarin + English texts), preprocessing (normalization, language detection), LLM fine-tuning components, ESG ontology integration, automated scoring, and output visualization; consider icons or color coding to distinguish bilingual handling and highlight multilingual NLP focus.

title: Performance Comparison of LLM-Based ESG Assessment vs Manual and Rule-Based Methods
caption: Quantitative evaluation of the proposed LLM framework against manual and rule-based approaches showing metrics such as accuracy, precision, recall, and F1-score across overall dataset and segmented by industry sectors. The chart demonstrates the improved effectiveness and robustness of the LLM method.
notes: Use grouped bar charts for each metric with color differentiation for methods; including sector-wise breakdown bars or a separate line chart for temporal trends could be useful. Annotate bars with exact values. Prepare placeholders in the figure to accommodate future results.

title: Semantic Patterns and Key ESG Themes Extracted from Bilingual Corporate Disclosures
caption: Heatmap visualization of frequency and co-occurrence of major ESG-related terms and themes detected by the LLM from bilingual Taiwan-listed company disclosures. The figure highlights linguistic nuances, theme prominence, and sectoral variations capturing the interpretability and semantic richness of the automated analysis.
data_source: Processed ESG disclosure texts (after LLM semantic extraction)
notes: Generate a heatmap matrix with intensity showing term frequency or co-occurrence scores, differentiated per language (Mandarin vs English) or sector. Include labels for key terms and sectors. Provide suitable color scale to reflect semantic intensity. May supplement with a word cloud inset for prominent keywords.
